item.title: Welcome to my personal blog!
item.description: Hello! This is my personal blog on my minimal website :) Here I will be posting interesting things related to projects I develop or to which I contribute. I’m also planning on expanding the language of my website to provide a Spanish option. Nonetheless, don’t expect to find here very technical info or news (well maybe some posts 🙃). Well, I hope you find interesting info navigating here! Have a nice time!
